author: y4rr
content: Implemented bf16 x f32-accum mixed-precision matmul/bmm/softmax via cuBLAS GemmEx/GemmStridedBatchedEx and PTX softmax_bf16_f32_kernel; matches torch.bfloat16 + autocast contract. All 10 probe tests pass on RTX 3090 (CUDA 12.8). Follow-up for remaining ~7 elementwise/reduction bf16 ops filed as #963.
